dimensions.name: Problem framing
dimensions.rationale: Decision and scope are explicit; reference error cost is not production-calibrated.

dimensions.name: Data contract
dimensions.rationale: Grain, rights, privacy and defects are checked on an aggregate tiny sample.

dimensions.name: Method and baseline
dimensions.rationale: The frozen gate retains baseline and reports threshold sensitivity.

dimensions.name: Verification
dimensions.rationale: Clean-room, shadow, negative, sensitivity and claim checks all pass.

dimensions.name: Delivery and handoff
dimensions.rationale: One package has a verify command, provenance, runbook and public boundary.

dimensions.name: Review and defense
dimensions.rationale: Review is closed and defense includes rerun plus five challenge classes.
